FOUNDERS BJS CO.

"We came. We saw. We conquered."

Alexander the Great

Alexander the Great was a military genius and courageous leader who conquered the Persian Empire and spread Greek culture throughout his realm. He earned the honorific "the Great" for his unparalleled success as a military commander — he never lost a battle, despite typically being outnumbered. PROMOTIONS & REACH

We're looking for people with knowledge and ambition — the kind who want to post, share their experience, and stay unbiased, helping people find their way to the places we actually stand behind. Our intention is simple: sample it all, from weed to tobacco to food, and help us grow further, wherever that takes us. We're not just chasing the best. We're chasing the best of the rest.

If this sounds like you, just reach out — a quick one-on-one is all we need to start the conversation.

Professionals You Can Trust

Micheal O'Neill

A veteran poker teacher with a long run of live tournament titles and cashes on record with Hendon Mob. Specializes in tournament strategy and helping newer players build a sound preflop foundation.

★ $25K Cash, WSOP Main Event, 2026
★ 2025 WPT Cambodia Main Event Runner-Up
★ 2x WSOP Ring Winner

🇬🇧

Samuel Welbourne

Built his name coaching cash game players, with a Hendon Mob record backing up years at the table. Known for breaking down hand ranges in plain language.

★ 5 protégés, 20+ cashes — 2026 WSOP
$ HM
🇬🇧

Jordan Bamford

Brings a data-driven approach to the game, with a Hendon Mob history of titles and deep runs. Works closely with newer members on mindset and bankroll discipline.

★ 5 cashes, 2026 WSOP Las Vegas Series
$ HM

What you get

1

Direct Union Access

No middlemen. Load straight onto the trusted tables running ClubGG and PokerBROS through our direct relationships with the people who actually run them.

2

Real Track Records

Every coach here has a verifiable Hendon Mob history — live titles, cashes, and results you can look up yourself before you ever commit to anything.

3

Transparent Staking

Clear terms, laid out before you load a single table. No surprises, no fine print you didn't see coming.

Founders  

IN-N-OUT SECRET MENU

Not on the board. Just ask for it by name.

Animal Style
A mustard-grilled patty, extra spread, grilled onions, and pickles on any burger. The most famous order on the secret menu.
Animal Style Fries
Fries topped with melted cheese, grilled onions, and spread.
Protein Style
Any burger wrapped in fresh lettuce instead of a bun. No carbs, no bun, all burger.
Flying Dutchman
Two beef patties and two slices of cheese — no bun, no veggies, no sauce. Just meat and cheese.
3x3 / 4x4
Three or four beef patties with three or four slices of cheese. Priced the same way as the regular menu, by patty and cheese count.
Grilled Cheese
Two slices of American cheese, lettuce, tomato, and spread — no meat.
Neapolitan Shake
A blend of all three milkshake flavors — chocolate, vanilla, and strawberry — in one cup.
Extra Toppings
Chopped chilies, whole grilled onion, and extra spread packets are all free for the asking.

No code word needed — just tell the cashier or the drive-thru speaker what you'd like.

Becoming an Affiliate

Unlimited Earning Potential, Bonuses, Yearly Retreat, Free Workshops, Direct Coach Access, A Real Community

🇮🇳

This Could Be You

A dedicated poker professional with a strong track record and a growing community following. Bring your reputation, your players, and your results — we'll bring the platform.

🇺🇸

This Could Be You

A respected name in the community, known for coaching real players toward real results. We're looking for affiliates who play the game the right way and want to grow with us.

$ HM
🇨🇦

This Could Be You

Someone who takes the game seriously and takes their players even more seriously. If that's you, we want to talk — wherever in the world you're playing from.

$ HM
🇳🇱

This Could Be You

A steady, well-liked presence at the tables who's ready to bring their community along. If you've got the following and the reputation, let's talk.

Dispensary Directory

Tap a zone to see licensed dispensaries and their official websites in that area. Not exhaustive, not sponsored — always confirm hours, ID requirements, and current offerings directly with the dispensary.

Tap a quadrant or a legend button to see dispensaries there

    Free Shuttles

    A few Las Vegas dispensaries offer free shuttle rides to and from their stores — details and restrictions vary by location. Call ahead to schedule your ride.
